description: Style Note Stay cool and stylish while you exercise in these track pants from nike. Wear them with a colourful tee and sports shoes for a fuss-free outfit which won't get in your way. The soft cotton fabric will wick away sweat and help you stay cool when things heat up! Also perfect for those armchair Sports fans who want something comfy to wear while lounging around at home.Product Details Black track pants with an elasticated waistband which fits snugly, insert pockets at sidesMaterial and Care 100% polyester Machine wash warm, inside out, with like colours Do not bleach or  dry cleanTumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron design Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
